instructions.instruction: Use Traditional Chinese when replying to the user in this project session.
Consult with the user before modifying files, launching GUI applications, running captures, or pushing commits.
Reading files is allowed without asking again, per user instruction.
Do not commit generated screenshots, cache folders, or log files.

architecture.component: Core capture module. It owns ticker parsing, Finviz URL construction, Playwright browser setup, screenshot capture, command-line batch mode, and progress callbacks used by UI layers.
Tkinter desktop UI. It should keep long-running capture work in a background thread and update widgets through a queue on the Tk main thread.
Streamlit UI prototype. Keep it working when practical, but the Tkinter UI is the preferred UI.
